threats.title: Axios Supply Chain Attack Pushes Cross-Platform RAT via Compromised npm Account
threats.summary: The popular HTTP client known as Axios has suffered a supply chain attack after two newly published versions of the npm package introduced a malicious dependency that delivers a trojan capable of targeting Windows, macOS, and Linux systems.
